Slack.title: Slack
Slack.description: Search messages, read channels, find discussions across your workspace.

Google Drive.title: Google Drive
Google Drive.description: Search, read, and fetch documents from Google Drive.

Everlaw.title: Everlaw
Everlaw.description: Search, organize, and retrieve documents from your Everlaw projects — metadata, keywords, document types — with review links.

TopCounsel.title: TopCounsel
TopCounsel.description: Outside counsel recommendations from The L Suite — 5,000+ in-house counsel community sentiment, rankings, and expertise evidence.

CourtListener.title: CourtListener
CourtListener.description: Free Law Project's legal research platform — millions of U.S. court opinions, PACER dockets, judge profiles, oral arguments, and citation verification.

Aurora.title: Aurora
Aurora.description: Read-only Consilio ediscovery — find matters, list workspaces, full-text search, AI-powered cross-matter investigations, every record cited to source.

Trellis.title: Trellis
Trellis.description: The largest state trial court dataset in the U.S. — dockets, rulings, verdicts, filings, judge and opposing counsel analytics, expert witness vetting.

Scope.title: Scope
Scope.description: Vendor dispatch for litigation services - court reporters, process servers, records retrieval, IMEs, expert witnesses, e-discovery, translation, mediators, trial graphics, foreign-jurisdiction counsel, and additional legal-services vendor types. Returns vendor cards by jurisdiction and category. Write tools (book / dispatch / award) gate on explicit human approval per the Scope Work Protocol.
